_comment: users.example.json — synthetic placeholder for the gitignored config/users.db SQLite database. Schema is auto-created by lib/rbac.js on first run. Tracks workspace membership and pending invitations.

statements: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspace_users (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, role TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member', joined_at INTEGER NOT NULL, invited_by TEXT, status TEXT DEFAULT 'active', UNIQUE(workspace_id, email))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invitations (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, role TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'member', invited_by TEXT, created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, expires_at INTEGER NOT NULL, status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending')
